name: Guanine
plain_summary: DNA/RNA purine base. Contributes to nucleic-acid absorbance near 260 nm.

abs.plain_caption: Purine UV bands ~246/275 nm (free base, aqueous teaching values).
abs.lit: λ_max after common aqueous nucleobase tables (e.g. Fasman / biochemistry handbooks); multi-Gaussian teaching envelope, not a digitization.
